items.claim: Conor McGregor used PEDs during his recovery process.
items.quote: the Paul George one is kind of interesting. Again, remember, dude, he took all those peeds during that time, which the New York Times reported

items.claim: Conor McGregor's physique has undergone visible transformations during his recovery period.
items.quote: you saw transformations in his own physique right over this whole course of time.

items.claim: The over/under for the Conor McGregor fight is set at two and a half rounds.
items.quote: The overunder here is set at two and a half
